Kerala Lodge Death: केरल के त्रिशूर में लॉज के कमरे में महिला और नवजात शिशु मृत मिले, पुलिस ने शुरू की जांच
description: Thrissur Woman and Newborn Dead: केरल के त्रिशूर में लॉज के कमरे से महिला और नवजात शिशु के शव मिलने से सनसनी। पुलिस ने मामला दर्ज कर जांच शुरू कर दी है।
content:
Kerala Lodge Death Investigation: केरल के त्रिशूर शहर में मंगलवार को एक लॉज के कमरे से 30 वर्षीय महिला और उसके नवजात शिशु का शव बरामद हुआ। पुलिस ने मामले की विस्तृत जांच शुरू कर दी है। मिली जानकारी के मुताबिक मृतका की पहचान त्रिशूर जिले की रहने वाली ज्योति के रूप में हुई है।
इतना ही नही बल्कि पुलिस की प्रारंभिक जांच के अनुसार बताया जा रहा है कि महिला की मौत प्रसव के बाद हुई समस्याओं के कारण से भी हो सकती है। जबकि इस मामले में पुलिस का कहना यह है, कि मामले के कई पहलू अभी भी तक पूर्ण रूप से स्पष्ट नहीं हुए हैं।
ऑटो रिक्शा चालक को महिला का मित्र बताया
जांच के दौरान यह भी पता चला है कि पुलिस एक ऑटो रिक्शा चालक को हिरासत में लेकर उससे पूछताछ कर रही है, उस व्यक्ति को मृतक महिला का मित्र बताया जा रहा है। पुलिस ने मीडिया से हुई बातचीत में बताया कि ज्योति 27 जून को दोपहर करीब 2:30 बजे शहर के एक निजी लॉज के कमरा नंबर 108 में ठहरी थी। उसे वहां पर एक ऑटो रिक्शा चालक लेकर आया था। जिसे लॉज का स्टाफ पहले से जानता था।
लॉज कर्मचारियों ने जांचकर्ताओं को बताया कि जब महिला ने कमरा लिया था। तब उन्हें उसके गर्भवती होने की जानकारी नहीं थी। पुलिस ने जानकारी देते हुए बताया कि जब महिला को बार-बार फोन करने पर कॉल का जवाब नहीं दे रही थी, तब लॉज कर्मचारियों के मन में चिंता पैदा हुई। इसके बाद ऑटो रिक्शा चालक उसकी जानकारी लेने के लिए लॉज पहुंचा।
महिला और नवजात शिशु दोनों मृत पाए गए
लेकिन जब कमरे का दरवाजा खटखटाने के बावजूद कोई जवाब नहीं मिला, तो उसने लॉज प्रबंधन को सूचना दी और इसके बाद प्रबंधन ने पुलिस को जानकारी दी। पुलिस और अग्निशमन एवं बचाव सेवा की टीम मौके पर पहुंची। मिली जानकारी के अनुसार लॉज का कमरा अंदर से बंद था।
इसलिए कई प्रयासों के बाद अधिकारियों को दरवाजा तोड़कर अंदर प्रवेश करना पड़ा। कमरे में प्रवेश करने पर महिला और नवजात शिशु दोनों मृत पाए गए। रिपोर्ट के अनुसार जांचकर्ताओं का मानना यह है कि महिला ने लॉज के कमरे में ही बच्चे को जन्म दिया था।
यह भी पढ़ें:  Amarnath Yatra: देशभर के रेलवे स्टेशनों पर हाई अलर्ट, अमरनाथ यात्रा से पहले बड़ा एक्शन
दोनों शवों को पोस्टमार्टम के लिए भेज दिया गया
पुलिस को यह भी आशंका है कि अत्यधिक रक्तस्राव या प्रसव के बाद उत्पन्न हुई किसी अन्य चिकित्सीय जटिलता के कारण महिला की मौत हुई होगी। हालांकि, मौत के वास्तविक कारण का पता पोस्टमार्टम रिपोर्ट आने के बाद ही चल सकेगा। पुलिस ज्योति और ऑटो रिक्शा चालक के बीच संबंधों की भी जांच कर रही है।
साथ ही यह भी पता लगाया जा रहा है कि गर्भावस्था के अंतिम चरण में वह अकेले लॉज में क्यों रह रही थी। फोरेंसिक जांच के लिए कमरे को सील कर दिया गया है और दोनों शवों को पोस्टमार्टम के लिए भेज दिया गया है। पुलिस का कहना है कि आगे की कार्रवाई पोस्टमार्टम रिपोर्ट और अन्य फोरेंसिक साक्ष्यों के आधार पर की जाएगी।

title: Google Launches Nano Banana 2 Lite, Gemini Omni Flash AI Models: Faster Images, Smarter Videos
description: Google has launched Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash, bringing faster AI image generation, 10-second AI video creation, and new creative tools to its growing Gemini ecosystem.
content: The tech world is racing to build the most powerful AI models. Anthropic has announced its latest Sonnet 5 which can code faster and offer better reasoning. How can Google stay behind? Sundar Pichai’s company has always focused on offering advanced AI models that can generate quick images and videos. Now, Google has introduced two new AI models, Nano Banana 2 Lite and the Gemini Omni Flash. As per the company, these models can work faster than their previous iterations, giving significantly faster results. Google Introduces Nano Banana 2 LiteGoogle rolled out Nano Banana 2 Lite, a new image generation tool that is claimed to create images in around four seconds. According to Google, the model can make images faster than before after receiving a text prompt, making it useful for rapid testing, brainstorming and high volume creative work.The tech giant says that Nano Banana 2 Lite is now available through Google AI Studio, the Gemini API, the Gemini app and AI Mode in Google Search. Gemini Omni Flash brings AI Video GenerationAlong with Nano Banana 2 Lite,  Google has also released Gemini Omni Flash in public preview. This tool focuses on AI-powered video generation and editing by allowing users to combine text, images, videos and natural language instructions to create or modify video clips.For new, the Gemini Omni Flash has a few limitations as well It can make videos up to 10 seconds long. Google notes that maintaining consistent characters across scene changes remains a challenge. Even so, the feature gives creators another way to experiment with AI-assisted video production without requiring advanced editing skills. Gemini Omni Flash is currently available through Google AI Studio, the Gemini API, the Gemini app and Google Flow.Google Explains The Nano Banana LineupWith so many Nano Banana models, it is bound to be confused with which one works for what. Here is a simple breakdown of these models. Nano Banana 2 Lite (Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Image): It is for users who need faster image generation with low latency but large-scale creative workflows. Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image): This is an all-round option, which can balance image quality, speed, and cost for everyday AI image generation.Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image): It targets professional users who require greater precision, stronger reasoning, and more control over complex image creation tasks.Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image): This one is the company’s image generation legacy model. It recommends upgrading to Nano Banana 2 Lite for better image quality, and low operating costs.

title: Nets agree to two-year deal with guard Keon Ellis: report
description: NEW YORK — The Nets have agreed to a two-year, $18 million guaranteed deal with free-agent guard Keon Ellis, according to ESPN’s Shams Charania, adding a defensive-minded rotation player who fills one of the team’s clearest backcourt needs. Ellis, 26, gives the Nets a point-of-attack defender with 3-point shooting ability and some secondary ball-handling. He’s expected to compete for a ...
content: NEW YORK — The Nets have agreed to a two-year, $18 million guaranteed deal with free-agent guard Keon Ellis, according to ESPN’s Shams Charania, adding a defensive-minded rotation player who fills one of the team’s clearest backcourt needs.Ellis, 26, gives the Nets a point-of-attack defender with 3-point shooting ability and some secondary ball-handling. He’s expected to compete for a rotation role off the bench next season.The move also reunites Ellis with Nets head coach Jordi Fernández, who was an assistant coach with the Sacramento Kings while Ellis developed from an undrafted free agent into an NBA rotation player. Ellis had been widely speculated as a potential Nets target because of that connection and Brooklyn’s need for more perimeter defense.Ellis spent last season with the Kings and Cleveland Cavaliers. His value is tied to his ability to defend opposing guards, pressure the ball, navigate screens and play without needing many touches. That skill set should have immediate utility in Brooklyn.The Nets’ projected roster includes Mikel Brown Jr., Egor Dëmin, Michael Porter Jr., Julius Randle and Day’Ron Sharpe, with Ellis, Nolan Traoré, Josh Minott, Noah Clowney and Danny Wolf among the second-unit options. Ben Saraf, Drake Powell, Terance Mann, Joshua Jefferson, Tyler Bilodeau, Chaney Johnson and Malachi Smith are also on the roster. Bilodeau and Johnson are on two-way contracts, while Smith is non-guaranteed.Brooklyn effectively chose Ellis at $9 million annually over Ziaire Williams at $6 million annually, prioritizing a more well-rounded rotation guard over a longer, more speculative wing. Williams offered size, athleticism and defensive upside, but Ellis brings a more solidified NBA role because of his guard defense, shooting and ability to handle the ball in secondary actions.According to Yossi Gozlan of Third Apron, the Nets still project to have about $34.74 million in cap space, $153.2 million in total salary, 15 players rostered and the $9.4 million room mid-level exception available. Brooklyn isn’t currently projected to be hard-capped, though Gozlan noted that acquiring Randle for Nic Claxton as an over-the-cap team would hard-cap the franchise.That cap position leaves the Nets with room to absorb salary in trades or help facilitate larger deals around the league.

title: Caitlin Clark Is Set To Debut Her First Nike Signature Shoe: Here’s What We Know
description: Caitlin Clark Is Set To Debut Her First Nike Signature Shoe: Here’s What We Know So Far
content: Nike x Caitlin ClarkNikeCaitlin Clark has become almost synonymous with basketball sneakers. Well, besides logo-range threes.Ever since she unveiled her debut Caitlin Clark x Nike Zoom Kobe 5 Protro "Indiana Fever" colorway, the pair has taken on a life of its own. It wasn’t long before they appeared on the feet of NBA stars and, perhaps most fittingly, nearly the entire Indiana Pacers roster. The release cemented Clark’s growing influence well beyond the WNBA, proving that her impact on the game extends as much to style as it does to what happens on the court. Now, she's taking the next step.On October 1, Clark officially enters signature-shoe territory with the debut of the Caitlin Clark 1, launching in an all-blue colorway alongside the first chapter of her namesake collection. The release also includes an 18-piece apparel line built around performance essentials designed to transition seamlessly from the court to everyday wear, while introducing Nike Standard Issue innovation to women’s basketball for the first time. Rather than leaning into the Indiana Fever’s signature red-and-gold palette, the Caitlin Clark 1 arrives wrapped in a textured blue upper that immediately sets it apart. Its sculptural form is inspired by the ripple created by a three-point shot, a subtle reference to her signature.Personal details are embedded throughout: Cast PU nodes form repeating "C"s along the lateral side and "2"s along the medial side, while hidden underfoot messages speak directly to her mentality: "Shoot More Threes," "From Anywhere," and "It Was Never a Long Shot."Performance remains at the center of the design. According to Nike, the shoe features an Opticast upper, an innovative construction made from cast PU nodes with varied Z-heights that reduces drag while enhancing movement efficiency on the court. Underfoot, a cushion midsole works alongside an articulated forefoot Air Zoom Turbo unit to deliver responsive cushioning, close-to-the-ground court feel."Having my own shoe has been a dream for as long as I can remember, and seeing it come to life is pretty incredible," Clark said. "I wanted it to reflect how I play—fast, confident, and ready to let it fly."She describes the process as a genuine collaboration. "Nike and I really crushed it. It was a true partnership. They listened to every detail, and the innovation is designed for my game." Seeing the finished product for the first time, she says, "will forever be a core memory."Still, Clark insists the shoe represents something larger than a personal milestone."What excites me most is what this can mean for the next generation," she said. "If it inspires even one kid to work harder or fall in love with the game, that's what makes it special. This is so much more than a shoe—it's about helping grow the game."This article was originally published on Forbes.com

title: খাৰঘূলিৰ ঘটনা মাৰ নৌযাওতেই দিছপুৰ আৰক্ষীৰ জালত কানপুৰৰ সৰবৰাহকাৰী
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্ক : শেহতীয়াকৈ গুৱাহাটী মহানগৰীত সংঘটিত হৈছে ইটোৰ পাছত সিটো অবাঞ্চিত ঘটনা। ২৯ জুন ২০২৬ৰ নিশা ৫৫ কোটি টকাৰ ৩৭ কিলোগ্ৰাম সোণ জব্দ কৰা ঘটনাই চাঞ্চল্য সৃষ্টি কৰি থকাৰ মাজতে এইবাৰ পোহৰলৈ আহিছে আন এট ঘটনা।
এইবাৰ দিছপুৰ আৰক্ষীৰ জালত পৰিছে তিনি জাল নোট সৰবৰাহকাৰী। গোপন সূত্ৰৰ ভিত্তিত অভিযান চলাই দিছপুৰ আৰক্ষীয়ে ধৃত সৰবৰাহকাৰী কেইজনক আটক কৰে। সৰবৰাহকাৰীকেইটাৰ পৰা ১৩ লাখ টকাৰ জাল নোট উদ্ধাৰ কৰে আৰক্ষীয়ে।
উল্লেখযোগ্য যে, জাল নোটৰ সমান্তৰালকৈ এখন বাহনো জব্দ কৰে আৰক্ষীয়ে। উত্তৰ প্ৰদেশৰ কানপুৰৰ পৰা আহিছিল সৰবৰাহকাৰী দলটো। একে সময়তে এইটোৱেও গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ কথা যে, ২৯ জুনৰ নিশা গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ কৰা স্বৰ্ণ সৰবৰাহকাৰী অক্ষয় বাঞ্চুৰীৰ ঘৰ মহাৰাষ্ট্ৰত।
এইবাৰ আটক কৰা জালনোট সৰবৰাহকাৰী কেইজন কানপুৰৰ। অতি কম সময়তে ঘটা এই দুয়োটা ঘটনাই এটা কথাই ভবাৰ অৱকাশ দিয়ে যে. চোৰাং কাৰবাৰৰ কৰিড'ৰত পৰিণত হৈছে গুৱাহাটী মহানগৰী।

title: Brewers ride four-run fourth inning to 7-2 win over Reds
description: Brandon Sproat pitched 5 1/3 solid innings to back up a strong day by the offense
content: MILWAUKEE, WISCONSIN - JUNE 30: Jake Bauers #9 of the Milwaukee Brewers is congratulated by Sal Frelick #10 after Bauers scored in the second inning against the Cincinnati Reds at American Family Field on June 30, 2026 in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. (Photo by John Fisher/Getty Images) | Getty Images	Box ScoreThe Brewers are starting to look like themselves again. After some recent struggles with runners in scoring position, they broke out of their slump with a big fourth inning, and with another solid day from Brandon Sproat, the Brewers took a 7-2 win on Tuesday night.The day started out looking rough for Sproat. After Elly De La Cruz hit a deep fly ball to start the game, Sal Stewart hit a home run to give the Reds an early 1-0 lead. Sproat also allowed a two-out walk to Eugenio Suárez, but he was caught stealing to end the inning.Meanwhile, Rhett Lowder struck out the side in the first inning to start his day strong. In the second, the Brewers got their first baserunner on a Jake Bauers single. He got to second on a passed ball by Jose Trevino to get into scoring position. On the next pitch, Garrett Mitchell singled to right, and Bauers beat the throw home. That tied the game at 1-1.Tied up again in the second, thanks to Garrett Mitchell pic.twitter.com/h9wECtOTDo— Milwaukee Brewers (@Brewers) July 1, 2026Sproat recovered from the first-inning run and kept the Reds in check for the next few innings. He worked around a one-out single in the second for a clean inning. In the third, he walked leadoff batter TJ Friedl and threw a wild pitch, but stranded Friedl at second. The fourth was Sproat’s strongest inning as he struck out the side.Lowder had a clean third inning, but the Brewers came out swinging in the fourth. They started the inning with five consecutive singles. William Contreras, Bauers, and Mitchell had the first three to load the bases. Sal Frelick hit the fourth and gave the Brewers a 2-1 lead. Joey Ortiz followed that with another single, driving in two to make it 4-1.With no outs and two on, Hamilton went for the sacrifice bunt and moved Ortiz up to second. Christian Yelich then drew a walk to load the bases again, and Jackson Chourio added the sixth single of the inning. That pushed the lead to 5-1.A six-hit, four-run inning in the fourth 😈 pic.twitter.com/waSthwlrzX— Milwaukee Brewers (@Brewers) July 1, 2026Brice Turang then (initially) drew a walk, but a challenge on ball four overturned the walk into a strikeout. Contreras followed that up with a groundout that Edwin Arroyo bobbled, but the second baseman still had time to throw out Contreras at first.The Brewers added on another run in the fifth. Bauers led off the inning with a home run on the first pitch he saw, increasing the lead to 6-1.1️⃣5️⃣ HR on the year for JB https://t.co/mFNFKjNqfypic.twitter.com/Dlce0R9OT0— Milwaukee Brewers (@Brewers) July 1, 2026A single from Ortiz three batters later ended Lowder’s day, and Caleb Ferguson entered in relief. He finished the inning with a Hamilton lineout. Lowder finished the day at 4 2/3 innings pitched and six runs allowed on 11 hits, striking out eight and allowing a walk.Murphy stuck with Sproat at 93 pitches entering the sixth. Unfortunately, the Reds broke through, scoring a run on back-to-back doubles by De La Cruz and Stewart. After a mound visit, Sproat struck out Bleday. That was the last batter Sproat faced. He finished the day with 5 1/3 innings pitched, two runs allowed on four hits and two walks with seven strikeouts. Though the results haven’t been pretty, Sproat finished up a good month of June for him, and is hopefully putting it all together in the majors.Brandon Sproat over his last four starts:3.00 ERA21 IP26 K https://t.co/LOPCqRrBXTpic.twitter.com/R6dq91j7VC— Milwaukee Brewers (@Brewers) July 1, 2026Chad Patrick entered in relief and kept the inherited runner at second, getting Suárez to pop out before striking out Nathaniel Lowe to end the inning.The bullpens locked it down from there, with one exception. In the eighth inning, Chourio hit a two-out home run into the Brewers’ bullpen. It was his 12th of the season and 10th of the month, extending the lead to 7-2.A 10-homer month for The Wonder Kid ❕❕❕ https://t.co/E6oGozFD1Spic.twitter.com/T6R3rCjkpS— Milwaukee Brewers (@Brewers) July 1, 2026Five different Brewers had multi-hit days. Bauers and Frelick led the day with three hits each. Chourio, Mitchell, and Ortiz added on two hits apiece. Hamilton and Yelich were the two Brewers who went hitless (though Yelich drew a walk). As a team, they went 5-for-11 with runners in scoring position and had a total of 14 hits, with only three of those going for extra bases.In the bullpen, Patrick had 1 2/3 scoreless innings with a strikeout. Jared Koenig worked around a hit for a clean eighth inning. Grant Anderson finished the game with a hit allowed and two strikeouts in the ninth.The Brewers have secured at least a split in this series against the Reds, but need one more win for a winning series and homestand. Game three is set for tomorrow night, but it’ll start at 7:10 p.m. because of an ESPN national broadcast. Shane Drohan faces Andrew Abbott in that game.

title: 'തെറ്റിദ്ധരിപ്പിച്ചു, ഇത് കടുത്ത അനാദരവ്', രൂക്ഷ വിമർശനവുമായി കെസി വേണുഗോപാൽ എംപി; പ്രതിരോധ മന്ത്രിക്കെതിരെ നോട്ടീസ് നൽകി
description: 'ഓപ്പറേഷൻ സിന്ദൂർ' സൈനിക നീക്കത്തിൽ സൈനികർ വീരമൃത്യു വരിച്ചതുമായി ബന്ധപ്പെട്ട് പ്രതിരോധ മന്ത്രി രാജ്‌നാഥ് സിംഗ് പാർലമെന്റിനെ തെറ്റിദ്ധരിപ്പിച്ചുവെന്ന് ആരോപിച്ച് കോൺഗ്രസ് നേതാവ് കെ.സി. വേണുഗോപാൽ അവകാശലംഘന നോട്ടീസ് നൽകി. ഓപ്പറേഷനിൽ ആരും മരിച്ചില്ലെന്നായിരുന്നു മുൻപ് മന്ത്രിയുടെ പ്രസ്താവനയെങ്കിലും പിന്നീട് 6 സൈനികർ മരിച്ചതായി സർക്കാർ സമ്മതിച്ചിരുന്നു
content: <p>ദില്ലി: 'ഓപ്പറേഷൻ സിന്ദൂർ' സൈനിക നീക്കത്തിനിടെ ഇന്ത്യൻ ജവാന്മാർ വീരമൃത്യു വരിച്ചതുമായി ബന്ധപ്പെട്ട് പ്രതിരോധ മന്ത്രി രാജ്‌നാഥ് സിംഗ് പാർലമെന്റിനെ തെറ്റിദ്ധരിപ്പിച്ചുവെന്ന് ആരോപിച്ച് കോൺഗ്രസ് ജനറൽ സെക്രട്ടറി കെ.സി. വേണുഗോപാൽ എം.പി. വിഷയത്തിൽ പ്രതിരോധ മന്ത്രിക്കെതിരെ സഭയെ തെറ്റിദ്ധരിപ്പിച്ചതിന് കെ.സി. വേണുഗോപാൽ ലോക്‌സഭാ സ്പീക്കർ ഓം ബിർളയ്ക്ക് അവകാശലംഘന നോട്ടീസ് നൽകി. 2025 ഏപ്രിലിൽ പഹൽഗാമിലുണ്ടായ ഭീകരാക്രമണത്തിന് തിരിച്ചടിയായി ഇന്ത്യ നടത്തിയ 'ഓപ്പറേഷൻ സിന്ദൂർ' സൈനിക നീക്കത്തിൽ ഒരു ഇന്ത്യൻ സൈനികന് പോലും ജീവൻ നഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടിട്ടില്ലെന്നാണ് കഴിഞ്ഞ വർഷം ജൂലൈയിൽ രാജ്‌നാഥ് സിംഗ് ലോക്‌സഭയിൽ പറഞ്ഞിരുന്നത്. എന്നാൽ, ഈ ഓപ്പറേഷനിൽ ആറ് സൈനികർ വീരമൃത്യു വരിച്ചതായി ഒരു വർഷത്തിന് ശേഷം സർക്കാർ ഔദ്യോഗികമായി സമ്മതിച്ചിരിക്കുകയാണ്.</p><p>യഥാർത്ഥ വിവരങ്ങൾ മറച്ചുവെച്ച് പ്രതിരോധ മന്ത്രി പാർലമെന്റിനെ ബോധപൂർവം തെറ്റിദ്ധരിപ്പിച്ചുവെന്നും ഇത് സഭയെ അനാദരിക്കുന്നതിന് തുല്യമാണെന്നും കെസി വേണുഗോപാൽ ചൂണ്ടിക്കാട്ടി. രാജ്യത്തിനായി ജീവൻ ബലിനൽകിയ ആറ് ധീരജവാന്മാരുടെ കുടുംബങ്ങളെയും രാജ്യത്തെ സൈന്യത്തെയും അപമാനിക്കുന്നതാണ് പ്രതിരോധ മന്ത്രിയുടെ നടപടിയെന്നും കോൺഗ്രസ് ആരോപിച്ചു. അതേസമയം, കോൺഗ്രസിന്റെ ആരോപണങ്ങൾ പ്രതിരോധ മന്ത്രാലയം നിഷേധിച്ചു. രാജ്‌നാഥ് സിംഗിന്റെ പാർലമെന്റിലെ പ്രസ്താവന സന്ദർഭത്തിൽ നിന്നും അടർത്തിയെടുത്ത് തെറ്റായ രീതിയിൽ വ്യാഖ്യാനിക്കുകയാണെന്നാണ് മന്ത്രാലയത്തിന്റെ വിശദീകരണം. ധീരജവാന്മാരുടെ ത്യാഗത്തെ രാജ്യം എപ്പോഴും ആദരിക്കുന്നുണ്ടെന്നും മന്ത്രാലയം കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു.</p>

title: U.S. coach Pochettino cool on favourite tag against Bosnia ahead of FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 clash
description: While Bosnia finished third in its group, ​the U.S. topped Group D by winning its first two matches against Paraguay and Australia to reach ⁠the knockout phase early.

title: സ്ലീപ്പർ ബസിൽ യാത്രക്കാർ ഉറക്കത്തിൽ, അമിത വേഗത്തിൽ ഇടിച്ച് കയറിയത് ട്രെക്കിലേക്ക്, അഗ്നിഗോളമായി ബസ്, 8 പേർക്ക് ദാരുണാന്ത്യം, 22 പേർക്ക് ഗുരുതര പരിക്ക്
description: അമിത വേഗതയിൽ സഞ്ചരിക്കുകയായിരുന്ന സ്വകാര്യ സ്ലീപ്പർ ബസ് ട്രെക്കിലേക്ക് ഇടിച്ച് കയറി തീ പിടിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു.
content: <p>ദൗസ: തീർത്ഥാടകരുമായി എത്തിയ ബസ് ട്രെക്കിലേക്ക് ഇടിച്ച് കയറി കത്തിയമർന്നു. ഡൽഹി മുംബൈ എക്സ്പ്രസ് വേയിൽ വൻ അപകടം. 8 പേർ കൊല്ലപ്പെട്ടു. 22 ലേറെ പേർക്ക് ഗുരുതര പരിക്ക്. രാജസ്ഥാനിലെ ദൗസയ്ക്ക് സമീപം പുലർച്ചെയാണ് അപകടമുണ്ടായത്. ഋഷികേശിൽ നിന്നും മുപ്പത്തിയേഴോളം യാത്രക്കാരുമായി മധ്യപ്രദേശിലെ ഇൻഡോറിലേക്ക് പോവുകയായിരുന്ന ബസാണ് അപകടത്തിൽപ്പെട്ടത്. അമിത വേഗതയിൽ സഞ്ചരിക്കുകയായിരുന്ന സ്വകാര്യ സ്ലീപ്പർ ബസ് ട്രെക്കിലേക്ക് ഇടിച്ച് കയറി തീ പിടിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. പുലർച്ചെ ഏകദേശം രണ്ടരയോടെ ദൗസ ജില്ലയിലെ കോൽവ പൊലീസ് സ്റ്റേഷൻ പരിധിയിലുള്ള ഒരു വിശ്രമകേന്ദ്രത്തിന് സമീപം വെച്ച് ബസ് മുന്നിൽ പോവുകയായിരുന്ന വലിയൊരു ട്രക്കുമായി കൂട്ടിയിടിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. ഇടിയുടെ ആഘാതത്തിൽ നിയന്ത്രണം വിട്ട ബസ് റോഡരികിലെ കുഴിയിലേക്ക് മറിയുകയും തൊട്ടുപിന്നാലെ ബസിന്റെ പിൻഭാഗത്തുനിന്ന് അതിശക്തമായ തീപിടുത്തം ഉണ്ടാവുകയുമായിരുന്നു. നിമിഷങ്ങൾക്കകം ഇരു വാഹനങ്ങളും അഗ്നിഗോളമായി മാറുകയായിരുന്നു.</p><p>അപകടം നടക്കുന്ന സമയത്ത് ബസിലെ ഭൂരിഭാഗം യാത്രക്കാരും ഉറക്കത്തിലായിരുന്നു. കൂട്ടിയിടിയുടെ അതിശക്തമായ ആഘാതത്തിൽ ബസിന്റെ മുകളിലത്തെ ബർത്തുകളിൽ ഉറങ്ങുകയായിരുന്ന യാത്രക്കാർ താഴേക്ക് തെറിച്ചുവീഴുകയും പലർക്കും തലയ്ക്ക് ഗുരുതരമായ പരിക്കേൽക്കുകയും ചെയ്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. തീപടർന്നതോടെ പരിഭ്രാന്തരായ യാത്രക്കാർ സഹായത്തിനായി നിലവിളിച്ചു. എന്നാൽ പലരും ബസിനുള്ളിൽ കുടുങ്ങുകയായിരുന്നു. അപകടത്തിൽ മരിച്ച എട്ട് പേരിൽ അഞ്ച് പേർ തീപ്പൊള്ളലേറ്റും മറ്റ് രണ്ട് പേർ തലയ്ക്കേറ്റ ഗുരുതരമായ പരിക്കുകൾ കാരണവുമാണ് മരണപ്പെട്ടതെന്നാണ് ദൗസ ജില്ലാ പോലീസ്വിശദമാക്കിയത്. അപകടം നടന്നയുടൻ തന്നെ ചില യാത്രക്കാർക്ക് സ്വയം പുറത്തുകടക്കാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞെങ്കിലും മറ്റുള്ളവർ തീയും പുകയും നിറഞ്ഞ ബസിനുള്ളിൽ കുടുങ്ങിപ്പോവുകയായിരുന്നു. ബസിന്റെ അടിയിലുള്ള സ്റ്റോറേജ് കമ്പാർട്ട്മെന്റിൽ വലിയ അളവിൽ സിഗരറ്റ് പാക്കറ്റുകൾ സൂക്ഷിച്ചിരുന്നു. ഇതാണ് നിമിഷ വേഗത്തിൽ വലിയ രീതിയിൽ തീ പടരാൻ കാരണമായതെന്നും ആരോപണമുണ്ട്.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>राजस्थान के दौसा में भीषण सड़क हादसा, 7 की मौत, जिसमें 5 की जिंदा जलने से ही मौतहरिद्वार से इंदौर जा रही श्रद्धालुओं की बस और ट्रक में टक्कर के बाद आग लग गई। बस में 37 श्रद्धालु थे।pic.twitter.com/hWiuy7f1Tq</p><p>— True Story Delhi (@TrueStoryDelhi) July 1, 2026</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>വിവരമറിഞ്ഞ് പൊലീസും അഗ്നിശമന സേനയും ആംബുലൻസുകളും ഉൾപ്പെടെയുള്ള അടിയന്തര രക്ഷാസംഘങ്ങൾ ഉടനടി സംഭവസ്ഥലത്തെത്തി നാട്ടുകാരുടെ സഹായത്തോടെ രക്ഷാപ്രവർത്തനം ആരംഭിച്ചു. ബസിനുള്ളിൽ കുടുങ്ങിക്കിടന്ന യാത്രക്കാരെ അതിസാഹസികമായാണ് പുറത്തെടുത്തത്. പരിക്കേറ്റ ഇരുപത്തിരണ്ട് പേരെയും ഉടനടി അടുത്തുള്ള ദൗസ ജില്ലാ ആശുപത്രിയിൽ പ്രവേശിപ്പിച്ചു. ഇതിൽ ഗുരുതരാവസ്ഥയിലുള്ള ചില യാത്രക്കാരെ വിദഗ്ദ്ധ ചികിത്സയ്ക്കായി മെഡിക്കൽ കോളേജ് ആശുപത്രികളിലേക്ക് മാറ്റിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. ദൗസ പോലീസ് സൂപ്രണ്ടും മറ്റ് ഉന്നത റവന്യൂ ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥരും ആശുപത്രി സന്ദർശിച്ച് പരിക്കേറ്റവർക്ക് മികച്ച ചികിത്സ ഉറപ്പാക്കാൻ മെഡിക്കൽ സംഘത്തിന് നിർദ്ദേശം നൽകി. ബസ് ഡ്രൈവർ ഉറങ്ങിപ്പോയതാകാം അപകടത്തിന് കാരണമെന്നാണ് പൊലീസിന്റെ പ്രാഥമിക നിഗമനം.</p><p>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് ലൈവ് വീഡിയോ കാണാം</p>

title: సాయికృష్ణ కేసు.. ఇద్దరు హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లకు రిమాండ్
description: Sai Krishna Death Case: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్‌లో పెను సంచలనం సృష్టించిన గాదె సాయికృష్ణ (25) కస్టడీ మరణం కేసులో మరో కీలక ముందడుగు పడింది. ఈ కేసులో...
content:
Sai Krishna Death Case: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్‌లో పెను సంచలనం సృష్టించిన గాదె సాయికృష్ణ (25) కస్టడీ మరణం కేసులో మరో కీలక ముందడుగు పడింది. ఈ కేసులో నిందితులుగా ఉన్న ఇద్దరు హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లకు విజయవాడ కోర్టు జులై 14వ తేదీ వరకు జ్యుడీషియల్ రిమాండ్ విధించింది. కృష్ణలంక పోలీస్ స్టేషన్‌లో విధులు నిర్వహించిన హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లు అశోక్, జంగం నాని సోమవారం సాయంత్రం సూర్యారావుపేట ఏసీపీ ఎదుట లొంగిపోయారు. అనంతరం పోలీసులు వీరిని న్యాయస్థానంలో ప్రవేశపెట్టగా, న్యాయమూర్తి రిమాండ్ ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేశారు.







Read also: Andhra Premier League: ఏపీఎల్ ఛాంపియన్‌గా భీమవరం బుల్స్..ట్రోఫీ అందించిన నారా లోకేశ్







నెలలు గడుస్తున్నా లభించని సాయికృష్ణ ఆచూకీ



గతంలో రౌడీషీటర్‌గా ఉన్న సాయికృష్ణను మే 6న నాన్ బెయిలబుల్ వారెంట్ల (NBW) అమలులో భాగంగా పోలీసులు ఆధీనంలోకి తీసుకున్నారు. అయితే, పోలీసులు అతడిని చట్టవిరుద్ధంగా బంధించి, థర్డ్ డిగ్రీ ఉపయోగించి చిత్రహింసల ద్వారా హతమార్చారని బాధితుడి తరఫు కుటుంబ సభ్యులు గట్టిగా ఆరోపిస్తున్నారు. ఆ తర్వాత సాక్ష్యాధారాలు లేకుండా చేసేందుకు మృతదేహాన్ని కూడా మాయం చేశారని వారు వాపోతున్నారు. ఈ దారుణం జరిగి నెలలు గడుస్తున్నా, సాయికృష్ణ ఆచూకీ ఇప్పటికీ తెలియరాలేదు.



‘సిట్’ దర్యాప్తులో నిందితులు.. కీలక విషయాలపై మౌనం



ఈ కేసులో అప్పటికే ప్రధాన నిందితుడైన సస్పెండెడ్ సర్కిల్ ఇన్‌స్పెక్టర్ (CI) ఎస్.ఎస్.వి.వి. నాగరాజును పోలీసులు అరెస్టు చేసి రిమాండ్‌కు పంపారు. కాగా, తాజాగా లొంగిపోయిన ఇద్దరు హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లను పోలీసులు ప్రశ్నించగా, వారు కొన్ని ముఖ్యమైన ప్రశ్నలకు సమాధానాలు చెప్పకుండా మౌనంగా ఉండిపోయినట్లు సమాచారం. ఈ కేసు తీవ్రత దృష్ట్యా ప్రభుత్వం ఐజీ ఎం. రవిప్రకాశ్ సారథ్యంలో ప్రత్యేక దర్యాప్తు బృందాన్ని (SIT) ఏర్పాటు చేసింది. అక్రమ నిర్బంధం, హత్యతో పాటు పీఎస్ లోని సీసీటీవీ (CCTV) ఫుటేజీని డిలీట్ చేసి సాక్ష్యాలను నాశనం చేయడం వంటి తీవ్రమైన సెక్షన్ల కింద ‘సిట్’ లోతుగా దర్యాప్తు చేస్తోంది.



వేర్వేరు జైళ్లకు నిందితుల తరలింపు



కోర్టు జ్యుడీషియల్ రిమాండ్ విధించిన నేపథ్యంలో.. హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుల్ అశోక్‌ను మచిలీపట్నం సబ్ జైలుకు, మరో హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుల్ జంగం నానిని ఏలూరు జైలుకు భద్రతా కారణాల దృష్ట్యా తరలించారు. ఖాకీల అండతోనే ఈ దారుణ హత్య జరిగిందనే ఆరోపణలు రావడంతో ఏపీ వ్యాప్తంగా ఈ ఉదంతం తీవ్ర చర్చకు దారితీసింది. దీంతో ప్రభుత్వం బాధ్యులపై కఠిన చర్యలు తీసుకునేందుకు నిష్పక్షపాత విచారణను వేగవంతం చేసింది.

title: Yamaha NMax 155 Design Patented; Shares Aerox 155 Engine
description: Yamaha has applied for a design patent for the NMax 155 in India, indicating its imminent availability in the market. This maxi scooter is larger and more comfortable than the Aerox 155, despite sharing its 155cc engine.
content: Yamaha has filed a design patent for the NMax 155 in India, the strongest signal yet that the maxi scooter is heading to Indian showrooms. For buyers who've been watching the premium scooter segment, this matters because the Yamaha NMax 155 sits above the Aerox 155 in terms of size and comfort while using the same engine. This basically means the power is familiar but the package around it is noticeably different. Here's all you should know about everything related to the India-bound Yamaha scooter.How Different Is It From the Aerox 155?More different than the shared platform suggests. While both scooters run the same 155cc, liquid-cooled engine with variable valve actuation producing 14.75 bhp of maximum power and 13.9 Nm of peak torque, the NMax 155 takes a different approach in almost every other way. The Aerox 155 goes for a sporty, aggressive stance while the NMax is boxier and more upright, closer to what you'd call a traditional maxi-scooter in style. It's also heavier, at 135kg kerb weight, that's 9kg more than the Aerox. The fuel tank is smaller too, at 5.5 litres versus the Aerox's larger unit but under-seat storage nudges slightly ahead at 25 litres. So it's more spacious to sit on, more practical for daily use but heavier and with a shorter range between fill-ups.What Features Does It Carry?The Yamaha NMax 155 doesn't skimp on tech despite its more practical brief. It gets a 4.2-inch colour TFT display with Bluetooth connectivity, keyless ignition, an idle stop-start system as well as dual-channel ABS as standard. That last one matters in India where single-channel ABS is still the norm on most scooters in this price bracket. One thing Yamaha will need to address before any India launch is E20 compliance, since the current NMax isn't tuned for ethanol-blended fuel and that's a regulatory requirement for any new scooter sold here.When Will It Launch?No official launch date has been announced yet, though several industry reports suggest a possible December 2026 window. Pricing is also unconfirmed, but since the NMax sits above the Aerox 155, which is currently priced from around Rs 1.44 lakh ex-showroom, expect the NMax to land somewhere above that, possibly in the Rs 1.60-1.80 lakh range once Indian taxes and compliance costs are factored in. Whether Yamaha positions it as a premium daily commuter or an aspirational maxi-scooter will shape exactly where that number lands.

title: Fan at Dodgers Game Goes Viral Celebrating Mexico’s World Cup Goal
description: A fan at the Dodgers-Athletics game went crazy when Mexico scored the opening goal of their Round of 32 tie against Ecuador in the 2026 World Cup.
content: In the middle of the bottom third inning of the Los Angeles Dodgers’ road game vs. the Athletics, a fan in a Mexico jersey was extremely loud after his team scored, just not one of the ones on the baseball field. With the Dodgers up 5-1 on the Athletics, Justin Wrobleski was winding up to deal as one of the fans from the stadium erupted. View this post on InstagramA post shared by Dodgers Nation (@dodgersnation)The fan got loud and waved his arms in a green jersey, which was indeed a Mexican National Team jersey. At the same time, Mexico scored the first goal in their Round of 32 game against Ecuador, taking them ahead 1-0.Mar 4, 2026; Glendale, AZ, USA; Fernando Valenzuela Jr in attendance of Team Mexico against the Los Angeles Dodgers during a spring training game at Camelback Ranch. Mandatory Credit: Mark J. Rebilas-Imagn ImagesShortly after an opening goal on a majestic strike from forward Julian Quinones, Mexico followed up with a second to secure a 2-0 advantage, with Raul Jimenez hitting his own amazing shot. The Dodgers, meanwhile, have been running things down in Sacramento, putting the finishing touches on two straight wins against the Athletics. It is hard to know if the fan in the Mexico jersey was a Dodgers fan, but there is no doubt that the Mexican community and the Dodgers have a long relationship. The Dodgers-Mexican connection Los Angeles is home to a huge Latino population, much of which consists of Mexican-Americans. Additionally, one of the franchise’s true legends, Fernando Valenzuela, is a Mexican native who helped usher in a wave of Spanish-speaking fans. Aug 11, 2023; Los Angeles, California, USA;  Los Angeles Dodgers retired pitcher Fernando Valenzuela (34) throws out the first pitch following a ceremony to retire his jersey number prior to the game against the Colorado Rockies at Dodger Stadium. Adrian Gonzalez is the most recent Mexican fan favorite to serve a role similar to Valenzuela’s, embracing his Mexican roots in LA. In preparation for the World Baseball Classic, the Mexican team had an exhibition game at Camelback Ranch against the Dodgers, with Fernando Valenzuela Jr. throwing out the first pitch. Mexican Heritage Night, among other special nights at Dodger Stadium, has become a massive occasion when thousands of Dodgers fans with Mexican roots come together to celebrate their culture at the ballpark. Without a doubt, there are plenty of Dodgers fans who are rooting hard for “El Tri,” especially with a squad that has inspired so much hope.

title: CBI करेगी TET पेपर लीक की जांच? गड़चिरोली में कांग्रेस अनुसूचित जाति विभाग ने किया आंदोलन, रखी  मुआवजे की मांग
description: Congress SC Department: TET पेपर लीक मामले की सीबीआई जांच, दोषियों पर कार्रवाई और नई परीक्षा तिथि घोषित करने की मांग को लेकर कांग्रेस अनुसूचित जाति विभाग ने ज्ञापन सौंपा।
content:
TET Paper Leak CBI Probe: शिक्षक पात्रता परीक्षा (TET) के पेपर लीक मामले की केंद्रीय अन्वेषण ब्यूरो (CBI) से निष्पक्ष जांच कराने, दोषियों पर कड़ी कार्रवाई करने तथा नई परीक्षा तिथि तत्काल घोषित करने की मांग को लेकर गड़चिरोली में कांग्रेस अनुसूचित जाति विभाग ने सरकार के नाम एक ज्ञापन सौंपा। साथ ही चेतावनी दी कि यदि मांगों पर शीघ्र कार्रवाई नहीं हुई, तो जिले भर में तीव्र आंदोलन किया जाएगा।
ज्ञापन में कहा गया है कि नीट (NEET) परीक्षा के बाद अब TET परीक्षा का पेपर लीक होना राज्य की परीक्षा प्रणाली पर गंभीर सवाल खड़े करता है। परीक्षा से एक दिन पहले ही विभिन्न जिलों से सैकड़ों अभ्यर्थी परीक्षा केंद्रों पर पहुंच चुके थे, लेकिन ऐन वक्त पर पेपर लीक होने के कारण परीक्षा रद्द कर दी गई। इससे हजारों अभ्यर्थियों को भारी आर्थिक और मानसिक परेशानी का सामना करना पड़ा है।
महाराष्ट्र राज्य परीक्षा परिषद पर गंभीर सवाल उठे
कांग्रेस अनुसूचित जाति विभाग ने मांग की है कि TET पेपर लीक मामले की त्वरित CBI जांच कराई जाए, मुख्य साजिशकर्ताओं पर कड़ी कार्रवाई की जाए तथा भविष्य में ऐसी घटनाओं की पुनरावृत्ति रोकने के लिए टीईटी परीक्षा ऑनलाइन माध्यम से आयोजित की जाए।
साथ ही, नई परीक्षा तिथि जल्द घोषित करने और परीक्षा के लिए यात्रा व अन्य खर्च उठाने वाले अभ्यर्थियों को उचित आर्थिक मुआवजा देने की भी मांग की गई है। इसके बावजूद महाराष्ट्र राज्य परीक्षा परिषद को ही पुनः परीक्षा की जिम्मेदारी दिए जाने पर विभाग ने गंभीर सवाल उठाए हैं।
यह भी पढ़ें:-  मुख्यमंत्री देवेन्द्र फडणवीस ने कहा- अनुसूचित जातियों के उप वर्गीकरण पर अभी अंतिम निर्णय नहीं 
मांगों पर शीघ्र निर्णय लें अन्यथा आंदोलन
कांग्रेस अनुसूचित जाति विभाग ने चेतावनी दी है कि यदि सरकार ने इन न्यायसंगत मांगों पर शीघ्र निर्णय नहीं लिया, तो गड़चिरोली जिले भर में व्यापक आंदोलन किया जाएगा।
इस अवसर पर कांग्रेस के जिलाध्यक्ष एड. विश्वजीत कोवासे, अनुसूचित जाति विभाग के जिलाध्यक्ष रजनीकांत मोटघरे, प्रदेश सचिव पंकज गुड्डेवार, प्रदेश महासचिव (सोशल मीडिया) नंदू वायलकर, परिवहन सेल अध्यक्ष रुपेश टिकले, सोशल मीडिया अध्यक्ष संजय चन्ने, प्रभाकर वासेकर, नितेश राठौड़, दत्तात्रय खरवड़े, जितू मुनघाटे, हेमंत मोहितकर, जावेद खान, कल्पना नंदेश्वर, रीता गोवर्धन, पौर्णिमा भडके, माधुरी मडावी, कविता उराडे, शालिनी पेंदाम, मंजू आत्राम सहित अन्य पदाधिकारी तथा कार्यकर्ता उपस्थित थे।

title: സംസ്ഥാനത്തെ റേഷൻ കടകൾക്ക് ഇന്ന് അവധി, സ്‌പെഷ്യൽ കെ ടെക് പരീക്ഷകൾ വീണ്ടും മാറ്റി| Innariyan 1 July
content: <p>പൊന്മുടിയിലേക്കുള്ള പ്രവേശന ടിക്കറ്റ് നിരക്ക് വർധിപ്പിച്ചു, സംസ്ഥാനത്തെ റേഷൻ കടകൾക്ക് ഇന്ന് അവധി, സ്‌പെഷ്യൽ കെ ടെക് പരീക്ഷകൾ വീണ്ടും മാറ്റി | ഇന്നറിയേണ്ട കാര്യങ്ങൾ</p>

title: മഹാത്മാഗന്ധി തൊഴിലുറപ്പ് പദ്ധതി ഇനിയില്ല; ഇന്ന് മുതൽ വിബി-ജി റാം ജി പദ്ധതി | VBGRAMG
content: <p>മഹാത്മാഗന്ധി തൊഴിലുറപ്പ് പദ്ധതി ഇന്ന് മുതൽ വിബി-ജി റാം ജി പദ്ധതി; ഇനി 125 തൊഴിൽ ദിനങ്ങൾ, കേന്ദ്രീകൃത പോർട്ടൽ വഴി തൊഴിലളികൾക്ക് ജോലി ആവശ്യപ്പെടാം, തൊഴിൽ കാ‍ർഡിൻ്റെ കാലാവധി മൂന്നുവർഷം</p>

title: മൂവാറ്റുപുഴയില്‍ വാഹനാപകടം; ടൂറിസ്റ്റ് ബസിന് പിന്നില്‍ ലോറി ഇടിച്ചു, 27 പേര്‍ക്ക് പരിക്ക് |Accident
content: <p>മൂവാറ്റുപുഴയില്‍ ടൂറിസ്റ്റ് ബസിന് പിന്നില്‍ ലോറി ഇടിച്ചു, 27 പേര്‍ക്ക് പരിക്ക്</p>

title: ഇത് രണ്ടാം വട്ടം, മലമുകളിൽ നിന്നും തള്ളിയിട്ട സ്ഥലത്ത് കുറ്റകൃത്യം വീണ്ടും പുനരാവിഷ്കരിക്കാൻ പൊലീസ്, ചേതനെ സ്ഥലത്തെത്തിച്ചു
description: പുനെയിലെ യുവ വ്യവസായി കേതൻ അഗർവാൾ കൊലക്കേസിൽ പ്രതിശ്രുത വധു സിയയും കാമുകൻ ചേതനും ഇന്റർനെറ്റ് സഹായത്തോടെയാണ് ഗൂഢാലോചന നടത്തിയതെന്ന് പോലീസ് കണ്ടെത്തി. കൊലപാതകം നടന്ന സ്ഥലത്ത് പോലീസ് വീണ്ടും തെളിവെടുപ്പ് നടത്തി.
content: <p>പുനെ : പുനെയിലെ യുവ വ്യവസായിയായിരുന്ന കേതൻ അ​ഗർവാൾ കൊലക്കേസിൽ തെളിവെടുപ്പ് തുടരുന്നു. മുഖ്യപ്രതികളിലൊരാളായ പ്രതിശ്രുത വധു സിയയുടെ കാമുകൻ ചേതൻ ചൗധരിയെ പോലീസ് വീണ്ടും കൊലപാതകം നടന്ന പൂനെ ലോ​ഗാ​ഹഡ് കോട്ടയിലെത്തിച്ചു. കേതനെ മലമുകളിൽ നിന്നും തള്ളിയിട്ട സ്ഥലത്ത് കുറ്റകൃത്യം വീണ്ടും പുനരാവിഷ്കരിക്കാനാണ് അന്വേഷണ സംഘത്തിന്റെ തീരുമാനം. ഇത് രണ്ടാം തവണയാണ് ചേതനെ സ്ഥലത്തേക്ക് കൊണ്ടുവരുന്നത്.</p><p>കേതൻ അഗർവാളിനെ കൊല്ലാൻ പ്രതികൾ ആസൂത്രണം നടത്തിയത് ഇന്റർനെറ്റിലൂടെയാണെന്നാണ് പൊലീസിന്റെ കണ്ടത്തൽ. ഫോറൻസിക് പരിശോധനയ്ക്കായി അയച്ച പ്രതികളുടെ മൊബൈൽ ഫോണുകളുടെ റിപ്പോർട്ടിലാണ് നിർണായക തെളിവാകാവുന്ന വിവരങ്ങളുള്ളത്. കൊലപാതകത്തിന് മുൻപ് സിയ നിയമ വിദഗ്ദരുമായി സംസാരിച്ചിരുന്നുവെന്നും പൊലീസ് കണ്ടത്തി. പിടിക്കപ്പെടാതെ എങ്ങനെ കൊലപാതകം നടത്താം, മൊബൈൽ ലൊക്കേഷൻ ട്രാക്ക് ചെയ്യപ്പെടാതെ എങ്ങനെ സൂക്ഷിക്കാം എന്നെല്ലാം പ്രതി സിയ സർച്ച് ചെയ്തതായാണ് റിപ്പോർട്ടിലുള്ളത്. ചാറ്റ് ജിപിടിയിലും, ഗൂഗിളിലും, യൂട്യൂബിലും ഡാർക്ക് വെബിലും സിയ കഴിഞ്ഞ ആറുമാസത്തിലേറെയായി തിരഞ്ഞിരുന്നത് ഈ കാര്യങ്ങളായിരുന്നു.</p><p>ഗൂഢാലോചനയുമായി ബന്ധപ്പെട്ട വിവരങ്ങൾ ആരും അറിയാതിരിക്കാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞ മൂന്ന് മാസക്കാലയളവിലുള്ള ചാറ്റുകളും വോയ്സ് നോട്ടുകളും സിയയും ചേതനും ഫോണുകളിൽനിന്ന് ഡിലീറ്റ് ചെയ്തിരുന്നു. ഇവ ഫൊറൻസിക് വിദഗ്‌ധരുടെ സഹായത്തോടെ വീണ്ടെടുത്തതോടെയാണ് കൃത്യമായി ആസൂത്രണം ചെയ്ത് സിയയും ചേതനും കൊലപാതകം നടത്തിയതെന്നതിൻ്റെ കൂടുതൽ തെളിവുകൾ പൊലീസിന് ലഭിച്ചത്. കൊലപാതകത്തിന് 34 മിനിറ്റ് മുമ്പ് സിയ ചേതനെ ഫോൺ ചെയ്‌തിരുന്നതായി അന്വേഷണ സംഘം കണ്ടെത്തിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. കൂടാതെ, പ്രതികളായ സിയയും ചേതനും കൃത്യത്തിന് ശേഷം രക്ഷപ്പെടാൻ ഉപയോഗിച്ച ആഡംബര കാറും, കേതൻ വിവാഹനിശ്ചയ വേളയിൽ സിയയ്ക്ക് സമ്മാനിച്ച വിലകൂടിയ വജ്രാഭരണങ്ങളും പോലീസ് പിടിച്ചെടുത്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. നിലവിൽ കൂടുതൽ ചോദ്യം ചെയ്യുന്നതിനായി ജൂലൈ 3 വരെ പ്രതികളെ പൊലീസ് കസ്റ്റഡിയിൽ വിട്ടിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p>

title: $1.4 bn! Crypto emerges as largest driver of income for Trump; here’s how this digital currency transformed the US Prez’s fortune
description: Trump's income from crypto ventures: ​​For 2025, Donald Trump also reported ​over USD 80 million in income from settlements with various media companies and USD 52 million in income from his company licensing his name to overseas property developers, driven principally by deals with Middle Eastern partners.
content: Trump's income from crypto ventures: Cryptocurrency has emerged as the largest driver of income for Donald Trump. According to a Reuters report, citing his latest financial disclosures, the United States President reported more than USD 1.4 billion in income from his family’s crypto ventures last year.This shows how Trump now derives most of his income from digital assets that have benefited from his policies.What does Trump’s annual disclosure for 2025 with ‌the US Office of Government Ethics say?The filings, his annual disclosure for 2025 with ‌the US Office of Government Ethics, disclosed that his companies received almost USD 800 million from World Liberty Financial, a crypto venture he and his sons co-founded. That income, which the president splits with family members, included more than USD 520 million from sales of crypto tokens and more than USD 250 million from the sale of interests in the World Liberty business.Trump reported another $635 million from the sale of his Trump meme coins.Has Crypto transformed Trump’s fortunes?The news underlines how crypto has transformed the president's fortunes. In his disclosure a year ago, for example, the president reported USD 57.35 million from token sales at World Liberty, which then leaped nine-fold in this year’s filing.Reuters recently estimated the Trump family has made at least USD 2.3 billion from crypto-related projects since Trump returned to the White House in 2025.On taking office, Trump began to put in place policies and initiatives that ⁠the industry saw as beneficial, from implementing federal rules for stablecoins to dialing back policing of the industry by the US Justice Department and the Securities and Exchange Commission.Income from settlementsFor 2025, the president also reported over USD 80 million in income from settlements with various media companies and USD 52 million in income from his company licensing his name to overseas property developers, driven principally by deals with Middle Eastern partners.White House spokesperson Anna Kelly said in a statement, “Neither the President nor his family has ever engaged — or will ever engage — in conflicts of interest. President Trump proudly made the United States the crypto capital of the world through executive actions.”Kelly added: “All actions by President Trump and his administration are taken in the best interest of the American people – and any so-called ‘reporters’ pushing otherwise are recycling the same, tired, false narrative that Democrats and the legacy media have been pushing for a decade.”Although crypto is by far the largest driver of income for Trump, his traditional businesses — in particular golf courses and resorts — continued to bring in millions.Trump reported a ‌15 per cent rise in ⁠revenue at his golf and resort facilities to just over USD 500 million in 2025. The strongest increases were at clubs where the president has spent considerable time since his 2025 inauguration.Revenue at his Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, which Trump dubbed the Winter White House, soared to USD 77 million from USD 50 million in 2024, while revenue at his golf club in nearby West Palm Beach jumped 27 per cent. Revenue fell at Trump’s Los Angeles course last year.(With inputs from Reuters)

title: Kylian Mbappe | মেসির ঘাড়ের কাছে নিঃশ্বাস ফেলছেন এমবাপ্পে, ১৮ ম্যাচে ১৮ গোল করে অনন্য উচ্চতায় ফরাসি তারকা
description:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্কঃ নিউ জার্সির মাঠে সুইডেনের বিরুদ্ধে জোড়া গোল করে ফুটবল বিশ্বের আলোচনার কেন্দ্রবিন্দুতে এখন কিলিয়ান এমবাপ্পে (Kylian Mbappe)। চলতি বিশ্বকাপে ৬ গোল করে লিওনেল মেসির পাশে নাম লেখালেন এই ফরাসি সুপারস্টার। শুধু তাই নয়, বিশ্বকাপের ইতিহাসে ব্যক্তিগত সর্বোচ্চ গোলের তালিকায় মেসির ১৯ গোলের রেকর্ডের খুব কাছে পৌঁছে গেলেন মাত্র ১৮ ম্যাচ খেলা […]
The post Kylian Mbappe | মেসির ঘাড়ের কাছে নিঃশ্বাস ফেলছেন এমবাপ্পে, ১৮ ম্যাচে ১৮ গোল করে অনন্য উচ্চতায় ফরাসি তারকা appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্কঃ নিউ জার্সির মাঠে সুইডেনের বিরুদ্ধে জোড়া গোল করে ফুটবল বিশ্বের আলোচনার কেন্দ্রবিন্দুতে এখন কিলিয়ান এমবাপ্পে (Kylian Mbappe)। চলতি বিশ্বকাপে ৬ গোল করে লিওনেল মেসির পাশে নাম লেখালেন এই ফরাসি সুপারস্টার। শুধু তাই নয়, বিশ্বকাপের ইতিহাসে ব্যক্তিগত সর্বোচ্চ গোলের তালিকায় মেসির ১৯ গোলের রেকর্ডের খুব কাছে পৌঁছে গেলেন মাত্র ১৮ ম্যাচ খেলা এমবাপ্পে।
চলতি বিশ্বকাপে ফর্মের তুঙ্গে থাকা এমবাপ্পে সেনেগাল ও ইরাকের বিরুদ্ধে গ্রুপ পর্বে দুটি করে গোল করেছিলেন। এবার সুইডেনের বিরুদ্ধে নকআউটের গুরুত্বপূর্ণ ম্যাচেও জোড়া গোল করে বুঝিয়ে দিলেন তিনি কতটা ভয়ংকর। বিশ্বকাপের মঞ্চে এখন এমবাপ্পের গোলসংখ্যা ১৮টি, যেখানে জার্মান কিংবদন্তি মিরোস্লাভ ক্লোসাকে পেছনে ফেলে তিনি এখন এককভাবে দ্বিতীয় স্থানে। তালিকার শীর্ষে থাকা লিওনেল মেসি ১৯ গোল করতে ২৬টি ম্যাচ খেললেও, এমবাপ্পে সেই মাইলফলক স্পর্শ করার অপেক্ষায় আছেন মাত্র ১৮তম ম্যাচেই।
মঙ্গলবার ম্যাচের শুরু থেকেই সুইডেনের বিরুদ্ধে গোল পেতে বেশ বেগ পেতে হয়েছিল ফ্রান্সকে। প্রথমার্ধে বেশ কিছু আক্রমণ প্রতিপক্ষের রক্ষণভাগ বা পোস্টে লেগে ফিরে আসায় দীর্ঘ সময় গোলের অপেক্ষায় থাকতে হয় দিদিয়ের দেশঁর শিষ্যদের। অবশেষে ম্যাচের ৪৫ মিনিটে গোল করে দলকে স্বস্তি ফেরান ফরাসি অধিনায়ক এমবাপ্পে।
বিরতির পর আক্রমণের ধার বাড়িয়ে সুইডেনকে আর সুযোগই দেননি ফরাসিরা। ৭৪ মিনিটে নিজের দ্বিতীয় এবং ম্যাচের তৃতীয় গোলটি করে দলের জয় নিশ্চিত করেন এমবাপ্পে। ব্র্যাডলি বার্কোলা করেন অপর গোলটি। শেষ পর্যন্ত ৩-০ গোলের বড় জয়ে টুর্নামেন্টের শেষ ষোলোর টিকিট নিশ্চিত করে মাঠ ছাড়ে ফ্রান্স।
বিশ্বকাপের গোলসংখ্যার এই লড়াইয়ে এখন এমবাপ্পে ও মেসির মধ্যে যে অদৃশ্য প্রতিযোগিতা শুরু হয়েছে, তা টুর্নামেন্টের বাকি ম্যাচগুলোতে ফুটবল প্রেমীদের উত্তেজনার পারদ আরও বাড়িয়ে দেবে তা বলাই বাহুল্য।

title: Zach Collins Agrees to Contract Extension With Chicago Bulls
description: The madness of NBA free agency is now upon us.
content: CLEVELAND, OHIO - DECEMBER 19: Zach Collins #12 of the Chicago Bulls celebrates making a three-point basket during the first half against the Cleveland Cavaliers at Rocket Arena on December 19, 2025 in Cleveland, Ohio. NOTE TO USER: User expressly acknowledges and agrees that, by downloading and or using this photograph, User is consenting to the terms and conditions of the Getty Images License Agreement. (Photo by Nick Cammett/Getty Images) | Getty Images	Power forward/center Zach Collins has agreed to a two-year, $17 million contract extension to stay with the Chicago Bulls through the 2027-28 season, per ESPN’s Shams Charania. Collins’ agent, Mark Bartelstein of Priority Sports, worked with the organization continuously over the last two days to keep his client off the free agency market and beat the July 1 deadline at midnight. The 10th overall pick in the 2017 NBA Draft appeared in just 10 games with the Windy City organization in 2025-26, averaging 9.7 points per game on a 57.8 field goal percentage/42.9 three-point percentage/77/5 free throw percentage, plus 5.6 rebounds per game, and 1.5 assists per game.Collins had a season-ending toe surgery just after the NBA All-Star break in February of 2026. Unfortunately, countless different injuries and surgeries have derailed the trajectory of his career over and over again. Across nine campaigns with the Portland Trail Blazers, San Antonio Spurs, and Bulls, Collins has suited up for only 388 of the 738 possible regular-season games. Arden Cravalho is a Gonzaga University graduate from the Bay Area… Follow him on X @a_cravalho

title: Unnao Accident: 5 Killed, 8 Injured As Bus Falls Off Agra-Lucknow Expressway After Collision With Car
description: Five people were killed and eight injured after a private sleeper bus collided with a car and fell off the Agra-Lucknow Expressway in Uttar Pradesh's Unnao district on Wednesday.
content: Five people were killed and eight others injured after a private sleeper bus collided with a car and fell off the Agra-Lucknow Expressway in Uttar Pradesh's Unnao district on Wednesday, police said.Related News | Final-Year MBBS Student Found Dead In Varanasi Medical College Hostel, Father Lost Contact For Five DaysThe accident took place on a stretch of the access-controlled expressway that passes through Unnao. According to police, the bus first hit a car before veering off the roadway and plunging down the embankment. Rescue teams and police personnel rushed to the spot and launched an operation to pull passengers out of the damaged vehicle.The injured were taken to nearby hospitals, where some are undergoing treatment for serious injuries.Related News | VIDEO: Maharashtra Student Stabs Teacher Inside Principal's Cabin Over Transfer Certificate DisputeThe latest tragedy has once again raised concerns over safety on the Agra-Lucknow Expressway, one of Uttar Pradesh's busiest high-speed corridors. The 302-km expressway connects Lucknow and Agra and carries thousands of vehicles daily.The corridor has witnessed a series of major accidents in recent years. In July 2024, 18 people were killed and 19 injured in Unnao when a double-decker bus rammed into a milk tanker on the same expressway. Investigators had then pointed to reckless driving as a likely factor.Related News | Commercial LPG Cylinder Prices Get Slashed By Rs 183 From July 1; Check City-Wise RatesMore recently, in May this year, six people died after a Bihar-bound bus overturned on the Agra-Lucknow Expressway in Unnao. Preliminary investigations suggested that the driver may have fallen asleep at the wheel.Another sleeper bus accident in March left one passenger dead and around 30 injured near Bangarmau in Unnao after the driver allegedly dozed off and lost control of the vehicle.The problem, howeve,r is not just confined to the Agra-Lucknow Expressway. Just this week, four people were killed in a Volvo bus-trailer collision on the Yamuna Expressway, while a separate bus accident on the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway claimed at least seven lives.

title: 70-ാം വയസ്സിലും 24 മണിക്കൂറും സേവന സന്നദ്ധയാണ് ഗ്രാമത്തിന്റെ സ്വന്തം രാധാമണി ഡോക്ടർ
Marc Stein: Walker Kessler is Lakers' top summer target
description: The Lakers are reportedly truly in pursuit of rising young center Walker Kessler.
content: For the last couple of seasons, the Los Angeles Lakers have been linked to Walker Kessler, a rising young center who has been a member of the Utah Jazz. He is a restricted free agent this summer, and the Lakers are one team that has been expected to make a run at him.Kessler was reportedly set to meet with teams in Los Angeles on Tuesday, the first day that NBA teams were allowed to talk to outside free agents. He is reportedly the Lakers' top target this summer, according to insider Marc Stein, and the departure of LeBron James could open up enough salary cap flexibility for L.A. to actually land him.The growing anticipation leaguewide is that the Lakers ultimately secure commitments on new contracts from Toronto free agent Sandro Mamukelashvili and Philadelphia free agent Quentin Grimes while still pursuing their top summer target: Utah restricted free agent Walker Kessler. https://t.co/pYMRcSyvrn— Marc Stein (@TheSteinLine) July 1, 2026Kessler won't be inexpensive, as he has established himself as a superb rebounder and shot-blocker in his four pro seasons. He has career averages of 9.5 points, 9.3 rebounds and 2.4 blocks in 25.3 minutes a game, and this past season, he showed some preliminary signs of developing a 3-point shot before a shoulder injury sidelined him after just five games.Per Shams Charania of ESPN, the Lakers have been meeting with a number of free agents, and Kessler is one of them."Right now as we speak, Lakers president Rob Pelinka has been in the midst of multiple meetings with free agents. That includes restricted free agents like Walker Kessler and Jalen Duren, that includes other unrestricted free agents as well. They're gonna prioritize some size, shooting, backcourt help, I think all of it. They're gonna have $50 million in cap space now that LeBron James has informed them so that they can move on with their business and he's gonna move on with theirs elsewhere. ... They're gonna be aggressive to try to fill this roster out with multiple different types of players."Deandre Ayton, the Lakers' starting center this past season, decided to exercise the player option on his contract. Dave McMenamin of ESPN said just days ago that due to Luka Doncic's desire for an "A-list center," L.A. may have to trade Ayton.This article originally appeared on LeBron Wire: Marc Stein: Walker Kessler is Lakers' top summer target

title: Delhi-Mumbai Expressway | দিল্লি-মুম্বই এক্সপ্রেসওয়েতে ভয়াবহ দুর্ঘটনা! ট্রেলারের সঙ্গে ধাক্কায় স্লিপার বাসে দাউদাউ আগুন, মৃত অন্তত ৭
description:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: দিল্লি-মুম্বই এক্সপ্রেসওয়েতে মর্মান্তিক পথ দুর্ঘটনা (Delhi-Mumbai Expressway)। মঙ্গলবার গভীর রাতে রাজস্থানের (Rajasthan) দৌসার কাছে একটি যাত্রীবাহী স্লিপার বাসের সঙ্গে ট্রেলারের মুখোমুখি সংঘর্ষের পর ভয়াবহ অগ্নিকাণ্ডের ঘটনা ঘটে (Bus Fire Tragedy)। এই ঘটনায় এখনও পর্যন্ত মৃত্যু হয়েছে কমপক্ষে ৭ জনের। গুরুতর আহত হয়েছেন আরও অন্তত ২২ জন যাত্রী। সূত্রের খবর, ঋষিকেশ থেকে […]
The post Delhi-Mumbai Expressway | দিল্লি-মুম্বই এক্সপ্রেসওয়েতে ভয়াবহ দুর্ঘটনা! ট্রেলারের সঙ্গে ধাক্কায় স্লিপার বাসে দাউদাউ আগুন, মৃত অন্তত ৭ appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: দিল্লি-মুম্বই এক্সপ্রেসওয়েতে মর্মান্তিক পথ দুর্ঘটনা (Delhi-Mumbai Expressway)। মঙ্গলবার গভীর রাতে রাজস্থানের (Rajasthan) দৌসার কাছে একটি যাত্রীবাহী স্লিপার বাসের সঙ্গে ট্রেলারের মুখোমুখি সংঘর্ষের পর ভয়াবহ অগ্নিকাণ্ডের ঘটনা ঘটে (Bus Fire Tragedy)। এই ঘটনায় এখনও পর্যন্ত মৃত্যু হয়েছে কমপক্ষে ৭ জনের। গুরুতর আহত হয়েছেন আরও অন্তত ২২ জন যাত্রী।
সূত্রের খবর, ঋষিকেশ থেকে ইনদওরগামী ওই স্লিপার বাসটি অত্যন্ত দ্রুতগতিতে যাচ্ছিল। গভীর রাত আড়াইটা নাগাদ বাসটি নিয়ন্ত্রণ হারিয়ে একটি ট্রেলারের পেছনে সজোরে ধাক্কা মারে। সংঘর্ষের তীব্রতায় মুহূর্তের মধ্যেই উভয় গাড়িতে আগুন ধরে যায়। বাসে আগুন লাগার সময় অধিকাংশ যাত্রীই গভীর ঘুমে আচ্ছন্ন ছিলেন। ফলে অনেকে বের হওয়ার সুযোগই পাননি।
স্থানীয় প্রশাসনের তথ্য অনুযায়ী, পাঁচজন যাত্রী আগুনে পুড়ে এবং দুজন মাথায় গুরুতর আঘাত পেয়ে ঘটনাস্থলেই প্রাণ হারিয়েছেন। আহতদের উদ্ধার করে দ্রুত দৌসা জেলা হাসপাতালে ভর্তি করা হয়েছে। আহতদের মধ্যে বেশিরভাগই নারী ও শিশু। পুলিশের প্রাথমিক ধারণা, বাসের চালক তন্দ্রাচ্ছন্ন থাকার ফলেই এই ভয়াবহ দুর্ঘটনা ঘটেছে। এছাড়া বাসের অত্যধিক গতিও দুর্ঘটনার অন্যতম কারণ হতে পারে বলে মনে করা হচ্ছে।
এদিকে, এই ঘটনাকে কেন্দ্র করে স্থানীয়দের মধ্যে তীব্র ক্ষোভের সৃষ্টি হয়েছে। এলাকাবাসীর অভিযোগ, দমকল ও উদ্ধারকারী দল ঘটনাস্থলে পৌঁছাতে অনেকটা দেরি করে, যার ফলে মৃতের সংখ্যা বেড়েছে। প্রত্যক্ষদর্শীদের দাবি, বাসের স্টোরেজ কম্পার্টমেন্টে বিপুল পরিমাণ সিগারেটের প্যাকেট ছিল, যা আগুনের তীব্রতাকে আরও বাড়িয়ে তোলে এবং দ্রুত বাসটিকে গ্রাস করে ফেলে।
বর্তমানে স্থানীয় প্রশাসন এবং পুলিশ ঘটনাটির তদন্ত শুরু করেছে। আহত যাত্রীদের পরিচয় শনাক্তকরণের প্রক্রিয়াও চলছে। এই মর্মান্তিক ঘটনাটি পুরো এলাকায় শোকের ছায়া ফেলেছে। যাতায়াতের পথে সুরক্ষার বিষয়টি নিয়ে আবারও প্রশ্ন তুলে দিল এই দুর্ঘটনা।
The post Delhi-Mumbai Expressway | দিল্লি-মুম্বই এক্সপ্রেসওয়েতে ভয়াবহ দুর্ঘটনা! ট্রেলারের সঙ্গে ধাক্কায় স্লিপার বাসে দাউদাউ আগুন, মৃত অন্তত ৭ appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.

title: FIFA: स्वीडन को रौंदकर अंतिम-16 में पहुंचा फ्रांस, एमबाप्पे ने रचा इतिहास, क्या टूट जाएगा मेसी का ये रिकॉर्ड?
description: France vs Sweden FIFA World Cup 2026: फ्रांस ने स्वीडन को 3-0 से हराकर राउंड ऑफ 16 में जगह बना ली। किलियन एम्बाप्पे ने दो गोल किए और अब वे लियोनेल मेसी के इस रिकॉर्ड को छूने के ऐतिहासिक रिकॉर्ड पर है।
content:
FIFA World Cup 2026: फ्रांस ने स्वीडन को 3-0 से हराकर FIFA वर्ल्ड कप 2026 के राउंड ऑफ 16 में अपनी जगह पक्की कर ली है। किलियन एम्बाप्पे ने एक बार फिर शानदार खेल दिखाते हुए दो गोल किए, जबकि ब्रैडली बारकोला ने भी गोल किया। इस जीत के साथ, फ्रांस ने टूर्नामेंट में अपनी शानदार जीत का सिलसिला जारी रखा। फ्रांस वर्ल्ड कप के इतिहास में लगातार पांच मैचों में कम से कम तीन गोल करने वाली पहली टीम बन गई है।
इस मैच में दो गोल करके, एम्बाप्पे ने वर्ल्ड कप में अपने कुल गोल की संख्या 18 तक पहुंचा दी है। वह जर्मनी के मिरोस्लाव क्लोजे को पीछे छोड़कर वर्ल्ड कप में सबसे ज्यादा गोल करने वालों की लिस्ट में दूसरे स्थान पर आ गए हैं। अब उनसे आगे सिर्फ लियोनेल मेसी हैं, जिनके नाम 19 गोल हैं।
एम्बाप्पे का शानदार फुटवर्क
फ्रांस ने पहले हाफ में कई मौके बनाए लेकिन स्वीडन के मजबूत डिफेंस के सामने गोल करने में उन्हें संघर्ष करना पड़ा। आखिरकार, एम्बाप्पे ने शानदार फुटवर्क दिखाया और पेनल्टी बॉक्स के अंदर से एक बेहतरीन शॉट लगाकर अपनी टीम को बढ़त दिलाई।
दूसरे हाफ की शुरुआत में ही फ्रांस ने मैच पर मजबूत पकड़ बना ली। माइकल ओलिस ने ब्रैडली बारकोला के लिए एक शानदार पास दिया, जिसे उन्होंने गोल में बदल दिया। इसके कुछ ही देर बाद, ओलिस ने एम्बाप्पे को एक और बेहतरीन पास दिया और फ्रांसीसी कप्तान ने शानदार तरीके से अपना दूसरा गोल किया। यह वर्ल्ड कप नॉकआउट मैचों में एम्बाप्पे का 10वां गोल भी था।
टीम ने दिखाया शानदार खेल
मैच के बाद फ्रांस के मैनेजर डिडिएर डेसचैम्प्स ने कहा, &#8220;हमें अपने प्रदर्शन पर गर्व है और यह जीत हमारे लिए बहुत खास है। राउंड ऑफ 32 के अन्य मैचों से यह साफ हो गया था कि यहां कोई भी मैच आसान नहीं है। हम पहले हाफ में मिले मौकों का बेहतर फायदा उठा सकते थे, लेकिन कुल मिलाकर टीम ने शानदार खेल दिखाया और जीत की हकदार थी।&#8221;

Triple threat 🤝
France have become the first team in @FIFAWorldCup history to score three or more goals in five consecutive matches 🇫🇷 pic.twitter.com/aI4tF2swg9
&mdash; FIFA (@FIFAcom) July 1, 2026

7वीं बार वर्ल्ड कप के प्री क्वार्टर फाइनल में पहुंचा फ्रांस
फ्रांस सातवीं बार फीफा वर्ल्ड कप के प्री-क्वार्टर फाइनल में पहुंचा है। इससे पहले, टीम 1986, 1998, 2006, 2014, 2018 और 2022 में इस स्टेज तक पहुंची थी। लगातार (लगातार चार बार) राउंड ऑफ 16 में पहुंचने के मामले में फ्रांस से आगे सिर्फ ब्राजील है। अब वे 5 जुलाई को फिलाडेल्फिया में पैराग्वे का सामना करेंगे। फ्रांस लगातार तीसरी बार वर्ल्ड कप फाइनल में पहुंचने के लक्ष्य के साथ मैदान पर उतरेगा।
यह भी पढ़ें &#8211; FIFA World Cup 2026: मोरक्को की जीत पर झूमीं नोरा फतेही, शेयर किया खास पोस्ट
डेसचैम्प्स ने कहा, &#8220;हमारा अगला मैच चार दिन बाद है, और अब हमारा पूरा ध्यान उसी पर होगा। हम आज की जीत का आनंद जरूर लेंगे, लेकिन बहुत आगे की नहीं सोचेंगे। पैराग्वे दक्षिण अमेरिका की एक बहुत मज़बूत और जुझारू टीम है। उनके पास कई प्रतिभाशाली खिलाड़ी हैं और वे यहां तक कोई इत्तेफाक से नहीं पहुंचे हैं। इसलिए, हमें अगले मैच में भी उतनी ही एकाग्रता और दृढ़ संकल्प के साथ उतरना होगा।&#8221;

title: The thrill of flight, inside Olympic ski jumping
description: Experience the thrill of Olympic ski jumping through Sarah Hendrickson’s eyes from takeoff to soaring flight.
content: For many, the thought of hurtling down a snowy slope at speeds over fifty-five miles per hour can be terrifying. For Olympic ski jumper Sarah Hendrickson, it is exhilarating, precise, and completely freeing. She describes going from zero to sixty miles per hour in just three seconds as something almost impossible to explain, even after fifteen years of training and competing. Ski jumping combines raw speed, technical skill, and complete awareness of one’s body and surroundings. This creates an experience unlike any other sport in the world.The process begins as Sarah positions herself at the top of a two-track slope. The air is crisp and carries the scent of snow and pine. The slope stretches downward, inviting her to take the plunge. As she puts on her goggles, it is a signal that the moment has arrived. Her focus sharpens, with sight aligned with the tips of her skis. The track beneath her is alive with motion, each ski bouncing slightly on the icy surface, creating a low rumble. Every movement and adjustment is essential for maintaining balance and ensuring a successful jump.At the end of the slope, the jump launches her into the air, covering a distance approximately the length of a football field. Although the flight lasts only about three seconds, Sarah experiences it as if time slows down. The sensation is unique. Silence surrounds her completely, leaving only the feeling of wind against her body. She compares it to putting a hand out of a car window while moving sixty miles per hour, feeling the lift and resistance. In ski jumping, however, it is her entire body interacting with the air. The moment is intense and yet strangely serene, combining excitement with a profound sense of control.During the flight, every sense is heightened. Sarah is fully in command of her body, balancing in midair, adjusting her posture, and reacting instinctively to subtle shifts in the wind. The experience requires intense concentration, but it is also deeply rewarding. The combination of speed, altitude, and freedom creates a feeling of flying that is thrilling and meditative. For Hendrickson, ski jumping is not merely a sport. It offers an opportunity to experience complete harmony between mind, body, and the environment.Ultimately, ski jumping is about more than distance or medals. It is about the indescribable sensation of flight. Being airborne and fully immersed in the moment gives a rare perspective on human capability and courage. Hendrickson emphasizes that the experience is the best feeling in the world, a blend of exhilaration, serenity, and empowerment. Ski jumping challenges the body and mind equally, providing athletes with a unique chance to soar both literally and figuratively in one of the most breathtaking sports on the planet.

title: Mbappe scores twice to tie Messi for World Cup lead with 6 goals, France beats Sweden 3-0
description:
East Rutherford, Jul 01: Kylian Mbappé put France ahead with a brilliant crossover step in the 45th minute and then added a second-half goal to break a World Cupknockout round scoring record, and Les Bleus beat Sweden 3-0 Tuesday to set up a round of 16 match against Paraguay.
Bradley Barcola added a 53rd-minute goal for France and Mbappé capped the scoring in the 74th minute for his third two-goal game in four matches. His six goals tied Argentina forward Lionel Messi for the tournament lead and gave him 18 in his World Cup career, one shy of Messi's record.
Mbappé's 10 knockout round goals are two more than the previous high by Brazilian greats Leonidas and Ronaldo. France coach Didier Deschamps bowed when his star came to the bench after he was substituted in the 85th minute.
France, the World Cup runner-up four years ago and a tournament favorite this time, has outscored opponents 13-2, with Michael Olise assisting on five goals.
On a brutally hot afternoon at MeLife Stadium, site of the World Cup final in July 19, France outshot Sweden 25-7, including 15-3 in the first half.
Seeking to reach its third straight World Cup final, France plays Paraguay on July 4 in Philadelphia, and the winner advances to a quarterfinal against Canada or Morocco five days later at Foxborough, Massachusetts.
It was 90 degrees Fahrenheit (32 degrees Celsius), sunny and humid at the 5 p.m. kickoff with poor air quality. During the first half hydration break, France defender Lucas Digne let himself be doused by a sprinkler.
Mbappé hit a post in the 32nd minute, raising both hands in disgust, and France nearly went ahead four minutes later on Olise's spectacular bicycle kick from just inside the penalty area, which also clanked off a post.
In the first World Cup meeting between the nations, Mbappé scored after goalkeeper Jacob Widell Zetterström tipped Olise's shot just outside the post.
Olise played a short corner kick to Ousmane Dembélé, who passed to Mbappé near the byline. Mbappé took a crossover step to get around Viktor Gyökeres and from just outside the 6-yard box sent a diagonal shot inside the far post.
Mbappé ran up the center of the field to celebrate his 61st international goal, colliding with Dembélé, and jogged to the bench to hug Deschamps, who returned for the match after going to France for his mother's funeral.
Gustaf Lagerbielke lost the ball ahead of France's second goal. Aurélien Tchouaméni passed to Olise, who nutmegged Lagerbielke, and Barcola took a centering touch and sent the ball past Zetterström's outstretched right hand.
Mbappé entertained the crowd with a backheel pass to Barcola in the buildup to France's third goal. Barcola passed to Olise, who passed to Mbappé as the star sprinted into the penalty area. He steadied the ball with a touch and fired the ball inside the far post.
A majority of fans wore France's blue, with a pocket in Sweden's yellow at one end. A crowd of 80,663 raised the record total for the expanded 104-match tournament above 5 million.

title: Racing face first, inside the world of skeleton sliding
description: Experience the thrill of skeleton racing through John Daly’s eyes, from sprinting to flying face first down the icy track.
content: At the top of the track before a race, skeleton slider John Daly tells himself that there is nothing he cannot do. The sport is notoriously dangerous, and athletes have died attempting it, yet the thrill of racing down a frozen track at nearly ninety miles per hour is irresistible. For Daly, it is the ultimate combination of fear and exhilaration. The sport demands courage, focus, and trust in one’s skill, creating a unique experience where danger and joy coexist in equal measure.The skeleton track itself is roughly one mile long. Athletes slide face first, mere inches from the ice, reaching speeds that can exceed ninety miles per hour. As the green light signals the start, sliders sprint to gain momentum and launch themselves onto the sled. In that instant, sound disappears. The world narrows to the feeling of contact with the sled and the ice beneath. For Daly, each ride is familiar yet intense. Having made the same leap for over fifteen years, the motion has become second nature, but the adrenaline never fades.The physical demands of skeleton racing are extraordinary. Pulling five times the force of gravity compresses the body, and an eight pound head can feel as if it weighs forty pounds during a run. Every movement requires precision and strength. If the body becomes tense or stiff, fear takes over, and the sled can break loose, resulting in a dangerous crash. Success relies on embracing the speed, surrendering to the track, and trusting the training that has prepared the athlete to react instinctively in a fraction of a second.Beyond the technical skill, skeleton racing is a test of mental resilience. The speed, combined with the proximity to the ice and the risk of injury, creates a pressure-filled environment where hesitation can be costly. Athletes must focus on the rhythm of the course, adjust their body subtly, and maintain absolute control over their movements. The sport rewards those who can merge fear with exhilaration, converting it into fluid motion. It is both physically punishing and mentally liberating, a paradox that draws athletes like Daly back to the track time and again.At the end of the run, the rewards are instant and intoxicating. After a perfect descent, Daly describes feeling as though he could run through a wall. The rush of adrenaline and the sense of accomplishment provide a unique kind of joy, unlike any other sport. It is this combination of danger, speed, and mastery that keeps skeleton athletes returning to the ice, eager to experience the singular sensation of flying just above it. For John Daly, skeleton racing is more than competition. It is a way to confront fear, push physical limits, and experience pure exhilaration with every run.

title: LPG Gas Price Cut: 19 kg commercial cylinder gets cheaper by Rs 183
description: Commercial LPG cylinder gets cheaper: 19-kg cylinder price reduced by Rs 183
content: Oil marketing companies have slashed the price of 19-kg commercial LPG cylinders by Rs 183.50 per cylinder, effective July 1, 2026. This marks the first reduction in commercial LPG rates this year. Meanwhile, the price of standard 14.2-kg domestic LPG cylinders remains unchanged.

title: Skubal works 6 strong innings, Tigers hit 5 homers in 9-3 win over the Yankees
description: The two-time defending AL Cy Young Award winner struck out nine and walked none.
content: NEW YORK (AP) — Tarik Skubal pitched six innings of one-hit ball and Riley Greene hit two of Detroit’s four homers off Cam Schlittler as the Tigers beat the Yankees 9-3 on Tuesday night and sent New York to its season-worst sixth straight loss.The Tigers hit five homers overall against the Yankees for the first time since Aug. 30, 2018.Skubal (4-4), making his fourth start since returning from elbow surgery, allowed only Ben Rice’s 23rd homer in the first inning and an unearned run in the sixth. The two-time defending AL Cy Young Award winner struck out nine and walked none after allowing four runs to the Yankees last week in Detroit.Skubal threw 61 of 87 pitches for strikes and retired 12 straight after Rice’s homer in the first.Greene hit a solo shot during a four-run first inning off Schlittler (8-5) and added a two-run drive in the third for a 6-1 lead. It was Greene’s eighth career multi-homer game.Before Greene’s first homer, Kerry Carpenter hit a solo shot in which center fielder Spencer Jones could not complete a leaping catch at the right-center field fence and saw the ball pop out of his glove into the Yankees’ bullpen.Spencer Torkelson hit a two-run homer to cap a 10-pitch at-bat in which he fouled off six pitches.Schlittler allowed a career-high six runs runs and seven hits in four-plus innings. The hard-throwing right-hander had his ERA climb from 1.62 to 2.08.Schlittler allowed four homers after allowing six homers in his first 17 starts. He had never allowed more than two in any start and became the first Yankees pitcher to allow four homers to the Tigers since Chuck Cary in 1989 at Tiger Stadium.Detroit’s James Outman hit a three-run homer in the sixth off Ryan Yarbrough after second baseman José Caballero committed a throwing error on a force play.New York has managed just 16 hits in its last five games.Up nextDetroit RHP Troy Melton (4-1, 2.39 ERA) opposes New York RHP Will Warren (7-3, 3.75) in the series finale on Wednesday afternoon.

title: Transfer center Moustapha Thiam set to stay, play at Michigan
description: The Michigan men's basketball team received more positive news on the roster retention front.
content: The Michigan men’s basketball team received more positive news on the roster retention front.Moustapha Thiam, who was viewed as one of the top centers in the transfer portal, is set to stay and play for the Wolverines next season despite Dusty May’s departure, according to multiple reports.A Michigan assistant coach shared the news on social media shortly after it was reported Tuesday night.More: Dusty May shares reasons for leaving Michigan, taking Mavericks jobRetaining Thiam is a huge coup for Michigan and interim head coach Mike Boynton Jr. The 7-foot-2, 250-pounder averaged 12.8 points, 7.1 rebounds and 1.6 blocked shots in 27.2 minutes per game last season as a sophomore at Cincinnati and is expected to play a major role in Ann Arbor.While Thiam can stretch the floor and has room to grow offensively, his greatest impact comes around the rim, particularly on defense. He registered a team-high 50 blocked shots and anchored a Cincinnati defense that ranked No. 10 in KenPom’s defensive efficiency.“You don’t find many players of his size and ability to move the way he does,” May said in a statement when Thiam signed with the program in April. “He protects the rim, rebounds, runs the floor, and changes the game defensively. He’s still improving, too.”Thiam headlines a three-man transfer class that ranks No. 12 in the nation, per 247Sports, and includes forwards J.P. Estrella (Tennessee) and Jalen Reed (LSU). The trio will help replace last season’s massive frontcourt — one that featured lottery picks Morez Johnson Jr., Yaxel Lendeborg and Aday Mara — that propelled Michigan to its first national title since 1989.Thiam is the third key piece on the roster who intends to remain at Michigan under Boynton for the 2026-27 campaign after May left for the NBA’s Dallas Mavericks, along with starting guards Elliot Cadeau and Trey McKenney.Since Boynton has the interim tag, the 15-day window for Michigan’s players to enter the transfer portal won’t open until July 24, 31 days after he was appointed. If Boynton does get the interim tag removed, the portal would open five days after that announcement.jhawkins@detroitnews.com@jamesbhawkinsThis article originally appeared on The Detroit News: Transfer center Moustapha Thiam set to stay, play at Michigan

title: आगरा-लखनऊ एक्सप्रेसवे पर दर्दनाक सड़क हादसा, बस-कार की टक्कर में 5 की मौत, कई घायल
description:
नेशनल डेस्क: उत्तर प्रदेश के उन्नाव जिले में बुधवार सुबह आगरा-लखनऊ एक्सप्रेसवे पर एक दर्दनाक सड़क हादसा हो गया। बांगरमऊ कोतवाली क्षेत्र में तेज रफ्तार स्लीपर बस ने एक कार को टक्कर मार दी। टक्कर इतनी जबरदस्त थी कि बस अनियंत्रित होकर डिवाइडर की ग्रिल तोड़ते हुए सड़क किनारे खंती में पलट गई। इस हादसे.
The post आगरा-लखनऊ एक्सप्रेसवे पर दर्दनाक सड़क हादसा, बस-कार की टक्कर में 5 की मौत, कई घायल appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
नेशनल डेस्क: उत्तर प्रदेश के उन्नाव जिले में बुधवार सुबह आगरा-लखनऊ एक्सप्रेसवे पर एक दर्दनाक सड़क हादसा हो गया। बांगरमऊ कोतवाली क्षेत्र में तेज रफ्तार स्लीपर बस ने एक कार को टक्कर मार दी। टक्कर इतनी जबरदस्त थी कि बस अनियंत्रित होकर डिवाइडर की ग्रिल तोड़ते हुए सड़क किनारे खंती में पलट गई। इस हादसे में कार सवार पांच लोगों की मौके पर ही मौत हो गई और कई अन्य लोग घायल हो गए।
यह दुर्घटना सुबह करीब 5 बजे एक्सप्रेसवे के 230.800 माइल स्टोन के पास देवखरी गांव के नजदीक हुई। जानकारी के अनुसार, कार में कुल आठ लोग सवार थे। हादसे में पांच लोगों ने मौके पर ही दम तोड़ दिया और तीन अन्य गंभीर रूप से घायल हो गए। मृतकों की पहचान दिव्या (13 वर्ष), अमृता (5 वर्ष), अंजू (40 वर्ष), धुनमुन (60 वर्ष) और कार चालक विनोद (45 वर्ष) के रूप में हुई है। बताया गया कि कार का पंजीकरण संतकबीरनगर जिले का था।

23 राज्यों में बारिश और तेज आंधी का अलर्ट, उमस और भीषण गर्मी से मिलेगी राहत

हादसे के बाद स्थानीय लोगों ने तुरंत पुलिस को सूचना दी। मौके पर पहुंची पुलिस और प्रशासन की टीम ने राहत एवं बचाव अभियान शुरू किया। कार में फंसे लोगों को बाहर निकालकर घायलों को इलाज के लिए अस्पताल भेजा गया। दुर्घटनाग्रस्त वाहनों को हटाकर यातायात भी सामान्य कराया गया। कार में घायल हुए तीन लोगों को पहले बांगरमऊ सामुदायिक स्वास्थ्य केंद्र (सीएचसी) ले जाया गया। उनकी हालत गंभीर होने के कारण डॉक्टरों ने उन्हें बेहतर इलाज के लिए लखनऊ के ट्रामा सेंटर रेफर कर दिया।
वहीं हादसे के समय बस में करीब 85 यात्री सवार थे। बस के पलटने से 17 से अधिक यात्रियों को भी चोटें आईं। सभी घायलों को प्राथमिक उपचार उपलब्ध कराया गया। कुछ यात्रियों को मामूली चोटें आईं और गंभीर रूप से घायल लोगों का इलाज अस्पताल में जारी है।
पुलिस ने मृतकों के शवों को कब्जे में लेकर पोस्टमार्टम के लिए भेज दिया है। साथ ही दुर्घटना के कारणों की जांच शुरू कर दी गई है। प्रारंभिक जानकारी के अनुसार, तेज रफ्तार और वाहन पर नियंत्रण खोने की वजह से यह बड़ा हादसा हुआ। प्रशासन ने घायलों के समुचित उपचार की व्यवस्था करने के निर्देश दिए हैं।

title: Satyadev | ‘రావు బహదూర్’పై సత్యదేవ్ భావోద్వేగం.. ఇది తెలుగు సినిమాకు ప్రేమలేఖ అంటూ కామెంట్
description: Satyadev | విలక్షణ నటుడు సత్యదేవ్ ప్రధాన పాత్రలో నటించిన సైకాలజికల్ థ్రిల్లర్ 'రావు బహదూర్' విడుదలకు సిద్ధమవుతోంది. దర్శకుడు వెంకటేష్ మహా తెరకెక్కించిన ఈ చిత్రం జూలై 3న ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా ప్రేక్షకుల ముందుకు రానుంది. ఇప్పటికే విడుదలైన ట్రైలర్ సినిమాపై మంచి అంచనాలు పెంచగా, ట్రైలర్‌కు సూపర్ స్టార్ మహేష్ బాబు అందించిన వాయిస్ ఓవర్ ప్రత్యేక ఆకర్షణగా నిలిచింది.
content:
Satyadev | విలక్షణ నటుడు సత్యదేవ్ ప్రధాన పాత్రలో నటించిన సైకాలజికల్ థ్రిల్లర్ ‘రావు బహదూర్’ విడుదలకు సిద్ధమవుతోంది. దర్శకుడు వెంకటేష్ మహా తెరకెక్కించిన ఈ చిత్రం జూలై 3న ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా ప్రేక్షకుల ముందుకు రానుంది. ఇప్పటికే విడుదలైన ట్రైలర్ సినిమాపై మంచి అంచనాలు పెంచగా, ట్రైలర్‌కు సూపర్ స్టార్ మహేష్ బాబు అందించిన వాయిస్ ఓవర్ ప్రత్యేక ఆకర్షణగా నిలిచింది. సినిమా ట్రైలర్ లాంచ్ కార్యక్రమంలో మాట్లాడిన సత్యదేవ్, మహేష్ బాబు అందించిన సహకారం గురించి ఎంతో భావోద్వేగంగా ప్రస్తావించారు. ‘రావు బహదూర్’ కేవలం ఒక సినిమా మాత్రమే కాదని, తెలుగు సినిమాపై తమ ప్రేమను వ్యక్తపరిచే ఒక అందమైన ప్రేమలేఖ లాంటిదని ఆయన అన్నారు.
ఒక ప్రేమలేఖ రాసిన తర్వాత దాన్ని మనకు అత్యంత సన్నిహితుడైన స్నేహితుడు చదివి విలువైన సూచనలు ఇచ్చినట్లే, ఈ సినిమా విషయంలో మహేష్ బాబు అండగా నిలిచారని సత్యదేవ్ తెలిపారు. ట్రైలర్‌కు తన వాయిస్ ఓవర్ అందించడం ద్వారా సినిమాను మరింత ఉన్నత స్థాయికి తీసుకెళ్లారని ఆయన ప్రశంసించారు. అంతేకాదు, ఇది నిజంగా తెలుగు సినిమాకు రాసిన లవ్ లెటర్ అని మహేష్ బాబు చెప్పిన మాటలు తమకు మరింత ప్రోత్సాహాన్ని ఇచ్చాయని సత్యదేవ్ వెల్లడించారు. ఈ సినిమా తన నట జీవితంలో కీలక మలుపు అవుతుందనే నమ్మకం తనకు ఉందని సత్యదేవ్ చెప్పారు.
నా జీవితాన్ని ‘రావు బహదూర్’కు ముందు, ‘రావు బహదూర్’ తర్వాత అనేలా ఈ సినిమా మార్చేస్తుందని నేను బలంగా నమ్ముతున్నాను అంటూ తన కాన్ఫిడెన్స్‌ను వ్యక్తం చేశారు. ‘కేరాఫ్ కంచరపాలెం’తో విమర్శకుల ప్రశంసలు అందుకున్న దర్శకుడు వెంకటేష్ మహా ఈ చిత్రాన్ని సైకాలజికల్ థ్రిల్లర్‌గా రూపొందించారు. ట్రైలర్‌ను బట్టి చూస్తే కథ, కథనం, విజువల్స్ ఆసక్తికరంగా ఉండబోతున్నాయనే అభిప్రాయం వ్యక్తమవుతోంది. ఈ చిత్రంలో సత్యదేవ్ సరసన దీపా థామస్ కథానాయికగా నటించగా, చింతా గోపాలకృష్ణ రెడ్డి, అనురాగ్ రెడ్డి, శరత్ చంద్ర సంయుక్తంగా నిర్మించారు.జూలై 3న ప్రేక్షకుల ముందుకు రానున్న ‘రావు బహదూర్’ బాక్సాఫీస్ వద్ద ఎలాంటి ఆదరణ పొందుతుందో చూడాలి. అయితే ట్రైలర్‌కు వచ్చిన స్పందన, మహేష్ బాబు మద్దతు సినిమాపై అంచనాలను మరింత పెంచేశాయి.

title: Commercial LPG Cylinder Prices Get Slashed By Rs 183 From July 1; Check City-Wise Rates
description: The 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder prices have reportedly been slashed by Rs 183 from Wednesday, July 01. Here’s how much these cylinders will now cost in your city…
content: After continued hikes from the last few months, businesses and the commercial food sectors are finally all set to witness some relief as far as commercial LPG cylinder prices go. Reportedly, the cost of the 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder has been reduced by Rs 183. The changed prices came into effect from Wednesday, July 01. The said price change will be seen in major Indian cities, including changes in Delhi, Mumbai, Leh, Lucknow, Chennai and more. For the national caption, the price before July 01 was Rs 3,113.50; however, it has now been reduced to Rs 2,930.The relief is yet to come for 14.2-kg domestic LPG cylinders, as there has been no change in the price of these cylinders.Here’s how much the 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder will now cost in your city:Let’s go through the city-wise price change for the 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder before and after July 01. For Delhi, it reportedly went from Rs 3,113 to Rs 2,930, whereas for Bengaluru, it went from Rs 3,198 to Rs 3,014. The prices in Mumbai were reportedly Rs 3,067 before July 01, which have now been reduced to Rs 2,884. For Kolkata, the commercial LPG cylinder cost was slashed to Rs 3,081 from Rs 3,265, while for Chennai, it went down from Rs 3,283 to Rs 3,099, as per reports. Reportedly, for Lucknow, the 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder prices have been changed from Rs 3,236 to Rs 3,052, while for Patan, the prices are now Rs 3,227, from Rs 3,410. In Leh, the changed cylinder price is Rs 3,594, from Rs 3,778.    This commercial LPG cylinder price cut is the first in months. The commercial LPG prices rose sharply in recent months, where the major acceleration came after the US-Israel-Iran conflict escalation in June. The war was quick to raise fears of disruptions to global crude oil supplies. Concerns over disruption to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz was another key factor that affected the prices across the world.

When Is The First Ekadashi Of July? Know Tithi, Puja Vidhi And Other Important Details
description: Devotees believe that keeping a fast on Yogini Ekadashi can free one from all the sins. Here are all the details you need to know.
content: Ever year, Hindus observe Yogini Ekadashi. It is observed on the Ekadashi date of Krishna Paksha of Ashadh month. According to ISKCON Dwarka, "The Brahma Vivarta Purana mentions Yogini Ekadashi Vrat Katha. Yogini Ekadashi is the most important Ekadashi vrat to eliminate sicknesses and ailments, which falls on Krishna Paksha of Ashadha month in North Indian Hindi calendars." Devotees believe that keeping a fast on this day can free one from all the sins.Here is everything you need to know about this day.Also Read: Why Does Lord Jagannath Fall Ill Before Rath Yatra? The Tradition Behind Anasara Kaal When Is Yogini Ekadashi?Date: July 10, 2026 (Friday)Tithi Begins: July 10 at 08:16 AMTithi Ends: July 11 at 05:22 AMParana Window: Morning of July 11 (after sunrise, typically between 06:00 AM and 09:00 AM)Puja Vidhi For Yogini EkadashiWake up early in the morning and take a holy bath.Make a sankalp to observe the fast in front of Lord Vishnu.Install an idol or image of Lord Vishnu for worship.Offer yellow flowers, fruits, panchamrit, panjiri , sweets, and tulsi leaves to the deity.Chant the mantra “Om Namo Bhagavate Vasudevaya” 108 times.Read or listen to the Yogini Ekadashi Vrat Katha (the sacred story associated with this fast).Conclude the ritual with an aarti performed with deep devotion and love.On the next day, Dwadashi, break the fast (parana) with the prasad of Lord Vishnu.During the fast, avoid consuming tamasic foods.Spiritual Significance Of Yogini EkadashiYogini Ekadashi is highly revered in Hinduism. Observing this fast is believed to absolve a person of all sins and help them attain moksha (liberation). It is said that those who sincerely follow this challenging fast are blessed with good health, happiness, and prosperity. Therefore, one is encouraged to observe a fast on this auspicious day with devotion and faith.Tulsi Pujan On Yogini Ekadashi On the day of Yogini Ekadashi, after taking a bath in the morning, worship Lord Vishnu as well as Tulsi Mata in a proper manner. Then offer water to Tulsi, light incense and lamp and do parikrama 7 times while chanting the mantra 'Om Namo Bhagwate Vasudevay'.Also Read: When Is Ashadha Gupt Navratri 2026? Check Dates, Significance and Ghatasthapana TimeWhile offering food to Lord Vishnu on the day of Yogini Ekadashi, do add Tulsi leaves in it, because Lord Vishnu does not accept the offering without Tulsi leaves. By doing this, God is happy and all wishes are fulfilled.Disclaimer: This article is based on popular beliefs. Times Now is not responsible for the accuracy or completeness of the information and facts provided here.
